prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约15134→18438→36338→19363，2024年因广播电视编导特殊类型出现异常大幅下降，2025年回归至约19363名，近3年整体后移约4200名；2025年基准约19363名；2021–2024年理科计划24→22→22→22人，2025年物理类计划21人；2026年物理类计划29人，较2025年扩招约38%，竞争有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜约第58名（2026年），近年排名稳定在58名左右，属全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（副院长婚内出轨被免职、误挂旭日旗等），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度总排名第69位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等偏低；教育学A、马克思主义理论A、地理学A、中国语言文学A-、外国语言文学A-，师范类与人文社科实力突出；理科招生专业中化学、生物科学类等与优势学科关联度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等理科热门专业社会热度持续偏高，对相关专业报考有正向拉动；四川省2026年物理类考生约32.9万人（估算），较2025年28.5万人增加约15.5%，竞争加剧；南京师范大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对西南地区考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在四川招生占比约2.3%（2025年），属中等偏下水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次19363名、2026年物理类扩招约38%使竞争缓解、声誉负面可能抑制部分报考热度、四川物理类考生增加约15.5%加剧竞争等因素，扩招效应与声誉负面共同推低位次数字增大，预计2026年最低位次约23889名，区间23389–24389名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 15134 → 18438 → 36338 → 19363. In 2024, due to the special type of radio and television directing, there was an abnormal significant decline, and in 2025 it returned to about 19363, with an overall backward shift of about 4200 places in the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 19363; from 2021 to 2024, the science enrollment plan was 24 → 22 → 22 → 22, and in 2025 the physics category plan was 21; in 2026, the physics category plan is 29, an increase of about 38% compared to 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 58th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings around 58th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is significantly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affairs, mistakenly hanging the Rising Sun flag, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin heat total ranking is 69th, rated as average, with medium to low short video exposure; Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, with outstanding strength in teacher training and humanities and social sciences; among the science enrollment majors, chemistry, biological sciences, etc., are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation continue to have high social heat, positively driving applications for related majors; the number of physics category candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is approximately 329,000 (estimated), an increase of about 15.5% compared to 285,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwest region; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2.3% (2025), which is at a medium to low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 19363, the 2026 physics category expansion of about 38% easing competition, negative reputation possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and the increase of about 15.5% in Sichuan physics category candidates intensifying competition, the expansion effect and negative reputation together push the ranking number higher. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 23889, with a range of 23389–24389.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics Teacher Training, Innovation Experimental Base, Information and Computing Science)
- Computer Science and Technology (enrolling in 2025, not separately listed in 2026 but includes Artificial Intelligence direction)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Energy and Power (Energy and Power Engineering, Energy and Environmental Systems Engineering, Energy Service Engineering)
- Chemistry (Teacher Training, Non-Teacher Training)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Physics (Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science National Science Base Class, Biotechnology, Ecology)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Biological Engineering
- Acoustics
- Synthetic Biology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23389–24389, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Energy and Power, Chemistry, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering), use Tier 1 majors (Mathematics, Artificial Intelligence) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Biological Sciences, Food Science and Engineering) as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<23389), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>24389), prioritize Tier 3 safety majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1775 → 2388 → 5504 → 3190. In 2024, due to the special type of Radio and Television Directing, there was an abnormal significant decline, and in 2025 it returned to about 3190. Over the past 3 years, the overall ranking has shifted back by about 1400 places, with a baseline of about 3190 in 2025. From 2021 to 2024, the liberal arts plan was 4 → 6 → 6 → 6 students, and in 2025 the history category plan was 10 students. In 2026, the history category plan is 4 students, a significant reduction of 60% compared to 2025, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Ranked approximately 58th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings around 58th in recent years. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affairs during marriage, mistakenly hanging the Rising Sun flag, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity total ranking is 69th, with an average evaluation. Education is rated A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, with outstanding strength in teacher training and humanities and social sciences. Liberal arts enrollment majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, and Primary Education are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese is recommended as slightly hot, teacher training/education is divided and wait-and-see, journalism and communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in Sichuan is approximately 206,000 (estimated), an increase of about 15.7% from 178,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwest region. The university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2.3% (2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3190, the significant 60% reduction in history category enrollment in 2026 sharply intensifying competition, negative reputation possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and an increase of about 15.7% in Sichuan history category candidates, the enrollment reduction effect far outweighs other factors. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward to about 2092, with a range of 1715 to 2469.
